package.name: zealphp
package.summary: Per-request function overrides for long-running PHP servers
package.description: ext-zealphp intercepts PHP built-in functions (header, session_start, setcookie, etc.) and routes them to user-supplied callbacks. Purpose-built for ZealPHP's coroutine server model — each request gets its own response/session state while legacy PHP code calls the same built-in functions unchanged. Allowlist-only design: 53 functions, no class manipulation, no general-purpose API.
package.notes: Initial release: - zealphp_override(string $name, callable $callback): bool - zealphp_restore(string $name): bool - zealphp_restore_all(): void - Allowlist of 53 PHP built-in functions - Handler-swapping on CG(function_table) - MSHUTDOWN auto-restores all originals - Tested on PHP 8.3, 8.4
